nasb.text: For every species of beasts and birds, of reptiles and creatures of the sea, is tamed and has been tamed by the human race.

esv.text: For every kind of beast and bird, of reptile and sea creature, can be tamed and has been tamed by mankind,

cnv.text: 各類飛禽、走獸、昆蟲、水族，都可以馴服，而且都已經被人類制伏了；

ccb.text: 自然界中的各类走兽、飞禽、爬虫、水族都可以被驯服，也已经被人类驯服了，

csbs.text: 原来，各类野兽、飞禽、爬行动物和水族都能被制伏，也已经被人类制伏了，
